_comment_discovery: Auto-discovery of MORE pages in this niche. OFF by default — the default run only analyzes the handpicked links in pages.txt. Search + seed-expand require a burner sessionid in session.txt (Instagram gates search behind login); guest mode alone cannot search. Tweak keywords/seeds/limits here, or just tell Claude what niche to target and it will rewrite this block.
_comment_virality: How 'viral' is scored. Each reel gets 4 signals, each normalized to a 0-1 percentile across the whole dataset, then blended by these weights into a 0-100 virality_score. Adjust weights to bias what 'viral' means for you (weights are auto-normalized to sum to 1).
